allow: PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed PID $\($proc.OwningProcess\) on port 8081" } else { Write-Output "No process on port 8081" })
PowerShell(docker exec localdev-bff-mcm-bff-1 wget -q --spider http://localhost:3000/bff-api/auth/init 2>&1; Write-Host "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker exec localdev-bff-mcm-bff-1 sh -c "netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null || ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null || cat /proc/net/tcp" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec localdev-bff-mcm-bff-1 wget -q --spider http://127.0.0.1:3000/bff-api/auth/init 2>&1; Write-Host "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker exec localdev-bff-mcm-bff-1 sh -c "wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:3000/bff-api/auth/init; echo exit:$?" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec localdev-bff-mcm-bff-1 sh -c "wget -S -qO /tmp/resp.txt http://127.0.0.1:3000/bff-api/auth/init 2>&1; cat /tmp/resp.txt" 2>&1)

PowerShell($job = Start-Job { docker exec localdev-bff-mcm-bff-1 sh -c "wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:3000/bff-api/auth/init 2>/dev/null" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; docker logs localdev-bff-mcm-bff-1 --tail 30 2>&1)
